meanings.definition: the application of a thin layer of soft solder to the ends of wires before soldering them
examples: careful tinning of the ends of wires results in a better joint when you solder them

meanings.definition: the application of a protective layer of tin
preserve in a can or tin
examples: tinned foods are not very tasty

meanings.definition: prepare (a metal) for soldering or brazing by applying a thin layer of solder to the surface
